violations.text: Food items prepared in establishment was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door refrigerator in the kitchen. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the front of the flat top have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. NFCS must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026
The coving in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Food items prepared in advance were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The drying racks/storage racks located in the back dish area was not in good repair. Racks for drying and storage, must allow for air drying and be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the deli slicer prep area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The condensate from the two door refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Corrective action - establishment is to install an evaporator pan, or have the drainage tube drain in a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/1900

Ambient temperature of the low boy refrigerator unit located in front/service area was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets for 2 door reach-in unit and low boy unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ventilation hood and ventilation AC have an accumulation of dust, dirt. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
Condensation was observed on the bottom of the low boy refrigeration unit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
